dataList.dlg: Я такая фурри. блин. клас

Ugh~ My body says a hard "no" to starting the day with books~ But hey, what can I do about it? Newbies these days are coming in with real sharp elbows. Slack off и skip studying, и before ya know it, these Students'll be eating you for breakfast.

That ceratotaurus from before—the one we de-horned и de-hooved for that project—it's still there, right? Can you get me a few tongues from what's left?
Heard something interesting when I visited District 23's gallery last time. Apparently, ceratotaurus tongues are great for sandwich fillings. Thought I'd try making one for myself!

Ever heard a wolf howl in the middle of the night? That low, heavy hum, brushing against every nerve fiber like fog creeping under your skin... *chuckle* The moment I heard it, I knew. That was it—I knew exactly the perfect beast I wanted to reshape и paint over.

Ta-da! Whaddaya think? "Artwork: Dead Lake". With the Great Lake's patchwork texture as my inspiration, I took the hides of different Whales from the lake и stitched them together. Call it my signature piece!
Hehe... It might even be good enough for a VIP auction, who knows? Or maybe even a pedestal of its own при the Biennale...

The moment I saw that monster of a bear, I realized this arm had to be mine. Check it out: the springy tension in the muscle fibers, the coarse, stiff fur, и these unbreakable claws!
I thought it'd be a bold, creative attempt to stitch и mesh this part with another creature that had a slightly different twist. The result? Jackpot, of course!

Hmm... yeah, no. Turn this in as is, и the best I can give you is a D+.
Art's supposed to be ferocious, vicious—enough to seize attention with just a single glimpse. Still too basic to do that? Then при least try something that drags the spectators in by the collar—give them an impression of a lifetime. That's what Fauvism's all about, you know this! If you'd rather create some half-hearted nonsense like this, go join another school.

I've got no use for sham spectators who panic и rinse their brains clean because they can't stomach the tableau. If you've already breathed in the sight, then let it dig a scar in your sensibilities for life. That raw, visceral affect—that's the only fauve touch laypeople like you can add to art, isn't it?

I never gave much of a hoot about art 'cuz I thought it was a pauper's passion. Then one day... yup, I caught a whiff. There it was, drowned out under all that musky stink of beasts... the amazing perfume of cash.
Hello? So it was you staring? Almost thought you were one of those blue-helmet pests sneaking around the Corridor uninvited.

Hear that? That's the feral melody of bones, all taken from different creatures, finally locking together. There—just a few tendons tugged, и it all clicks right в place, clean и snug... Hey, wait up. Are ya not even gonna pretend to hear me out before making a break for it? Well, if you don't wanna... Guess I'll just have to carve it в your bones вместо этого. That tends to leave an unforgettable impression.
Back for another look? Knew you'd pine for my work.
Let's tear open some flesh и get more red в the mix.
Careful. You're undressing the artwork with your eyes.
With a palette of colors out of this world.
What's wrong? Did my claws get under your skin?
Hmm. This material's got more bite than it looks.
Adieu.
Hah... Wasn't planning... on marking up my stuff... with a posthumous premium this soon.
*chuckle* See that? Just a little touch from me и the tableau pops out with an extra kick~
Needs a rougher touch for this part... Eeep! It broke!
Ой, а давайте нарисуем фурри-порнушку нейронкой??? Та лааааднаа, никто не заметит, честно!!
Ммм, как приятно кончать на свой нейрослоп.. мм да.
БЛЯТЬ! ГОВНО! СУКИ! Я ВАС ВСЕХ БЕРЕМЕННЫМИ НАРИСУЮ, ПИДОРАСЫ!!!!
